content: Hi all. I am currently working on a driver for a mfd that does microphones and iio-adjacent sensors. Has anyone started working on rust bindings to either alsa or iio that i could use for it? And if not, how does one start with the whole process?
No I don't think there are abstractions for those yet.

There's documentation about the process on the website: https://rust-for-linux.com/contributing
The general kernel information under Documentation/process is also important. This is mention on the above site.
